gakuranCodes.title: Latest Gakuran Codes
gakuranCodes.intro: Gakuran codes can help players obtain free rewards without spending additional resources. Enter each code exactly as shown because capitalization, spaces, and punctuation may affect redemption.

codes.reward: No publicly available reward codes are currently listed for Gakuran.
codes.action: Check the in-game code section after future Gakuran updates.

codes.reward: Open Gakuran, locate the code redemption option, enter an active code, and confirm the entry.
codes.action: Enter codes exactly as displayed, including capitalization.

codes.reward: Check spelling, capitalization, expiration status, and whether the code was already redeemed.
codes.action: Rejoin Gakuran if a valid code does not apply on the first try.

gakuranBeginnerGuide.title: Gakuran Beginner Guide
gakuranBeginnerGuide.intro: New players should first become comfortable with movement and combat before challenging experienced opponents. Exploring the school, learning available systems, and practicing basic attacks will make early progression in Gakuran much easier.

steps.title: Set Up Your Character
steps.description: Complete the initial character setup and review any available appearance, identity, or starting options before entering the main school area.
steps.tip: Avoid spending limited rerolls until you understand which character options affect gameplay.

steps.title: Learn Basic Movement
steps.description: Practice walking, sprinting, jumping, and moving around obstacles in a safe area before starting combat.
steps.tip: Good movement helps you avoid attacks and create space during fights.

steps.title: Explore the School
steps.description: Walk through the school and surrounding areas to learn where important characters, activities, and interaction points are located.
steps.tip: Remember commonly visited locations so you can return quickly.

steps.title: Open the Phone
steps.description: Check the phone interface and review its available features, menus, and progression information.
steps.tip: The phone provides quick access to important Gakuran systems.

steps.title: Practice Basic Combat
steps.description: Learn normal attacks, defensive actions, movement during combat, and the timing required to connect multiple hits.
steps.tip: Do not repeatedly attack without watching your opponent’s movement.

steps.title: Learn Your Fighting Style
steps.description: Review the speed, range, attacks, and combo options of your current fighting style before attempting serious PvP battles.
steps.tip: A familiar fighting style is usually more effective than an unfamiliar high-ranked style.

steps.title: Build Early Progress
steps.description: Complete available activities, improve your combat knowledge, and save valuable resources for upgrades or rerolls that provide a clear benefit.
steps.tip: Prioritize consistent progression instead of repeatedly fighting stronger players.

gakuranFightingStylesTierList.title: Gakuran Fighting Styles Tier List
gakuranFightingStylesTierList.intro: A fighting style performs best when its attack timing, movement options, and combo routes match the player using it. The categories below explain how styles should be evaluated without relying only on raw damage.

tiers.label: Top-Tier
tiers.criteria: Styles with reliable combos, strong pressure, useful mobility, and few major weaknesses.

tiers.label: Strong
tiers.criteria: Styles that perform well in most fights but may require better timing or have one noticeable limitation.

tiers.label: Balanced
tiers.criteria: Styles with useful tools and reasonable damage that depend more heavily on player skill or favorable situations.

tiers.label: Situational
tiers.criteria: Styles that can win fights but are less consistent because of slower attacks, limited pressure, or difficult combo routes.

tiers.label: Low-Tier
tiers.criteria: Styles with major limitations that make competitive fights harder without significantly greater player skill.

gakuranControlsGuide.title: Gakuran Controls Guide
gakuranControlsGuide.intro: Learning the controls before entering PvP makes movement and combat much easier. Practice each action separately, then combine movement, attacks, and defensive actions during fights.

controls.usage: Move forward, left, backward, or right
Jump over obstacles or change vertical position
controls.tip: Avoid unnecessary jumps that make movement predictable.

controls.usage: Move faster while exploring or repositioning
controls.tip: Use sprinting to control distance from opponents.

controls.usage: Look around and track nearby players

controls.tip: Time attacks instead of clicking continuously.

controls.usage: Use the available secondary or defensive combat input
controls.tip: Test the action safely before relying on it in PvP.

controls.usage: Interact with nearby characters, objects, or prompts
controls.tip: Watch for interaction prompts while exploring.

controls.usage: Access phone features and game menus
controls.tip: Close the phone before entering combat.

controls.usage: Open settings, player options, and the leave-game menu
controls.tip: Adjust camera and input settings when controls feel uncomfortable.

gakuranCombatGuide.title: Gakuran Combat Guide
gakuranCombatGuide.intro: This guide explains the main combat concepts in Gakuran, including attacking, blocking, dodging, combo timing, and battle preparation. Players can use these fundamentals to improve their performance during fights.

items.title: Basic Attacks
items.description: Learn how to use standard attacks effectively and understand attack timing during fights.

items.title: Blocking
items.description: Use defensive techniques to reduce incoming damage and create openings against opponents.

items.title: Dodging
items.description: Avoid enemy attacks by improving movement awareness and reaction timing.

items.title: Combos
items.description: Combine attacks smoothly to maintain pressure and improve combat efficiency.

items.title: PvP Strategy
items.description: Improve battle results by learning positioning, patience, and opponent reading.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Gakuran.

questions.question: What is Gakuran on Roblox?
questions.answer: Gakuran is a Roblox Japanese school roleplay experience set in 2007 Japan that combines exploration, social interaction, and PvP fighting with multiple fighting styles.

questions.question: How many fighting styles are in Gakuran?
questions.answer: Gakuran offers several fighting styles, each with different speed, range, combo potential, and PvP strengths. Our Gakuran Fighting Styles Tier List ranks them by overall usefulness.

questions.question: Are there active Gakuran codes?
questions.answer: Gakuran codes can provide free rerolls and rewards when available. Check our Gakuran Codes section for the latest active codes and redemption steps.

questions.question: Is Gakuran free to play?
questions.answer: Yes. Gakuran is free to play on Roblox across PC, mobile, and supported consoles, with optional in-game purchases.

questions.question: Does Gakuran support PvP combat?
questions.answer: Yes. Gakuran centers on PvP combat where players fight using different fighting styles. Learning controls, blocking, dodging, and combos improves your results.

questions.question: Where can I play Gakuran?
questions.answer: You can play Gakuran on the official Roblox game page. Use our Gakuran Controls Guide to set up your key bindings before your first fight.
